ddls:
CREATE TABLE "police_districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each police district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the police district */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the police district is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the police district is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the police district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "crime_rate_per_100k" REAL /* Crime rate per 100,000 population */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the district was established */,
  "chief_officer_name" TEXT /* Name of the chief officer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types" (
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime type */,
  "crime_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime type */,
  "severity_level" INTEGER /* Severity level of the crime */,
  "legal_reference" TEXT /* Relevant legal statutes or codes */,
  "punishment_range" TEXT /* Range of possible punishments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime statistic entry */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the police district */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "crime_count" INTEGER /* Number of crimes of the specified type in the specified district and year */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district for the year */,
  "crime_rate_per_100k" REAL /* Crime rate per 100,000 population for the year */,
  "reported_crimes" INTEGER /* Number of crimes reported */,
  "solved_crimes" INTEGER /* Number of crimes solved */,
  "arrests_made" INTEGER /* Number of arrests made */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the statistics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_crime_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES police_districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime report */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the police district where the crime occurred */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the crime report was filed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the crime */,
  "evidence" TEXT /* Evidence collected related to the crime */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the crime report (e.g., Open, Closed, Under Investigation) */,
  "case_number" TEXT /* Unique case number for the report */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who filed the report */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Name of the officer who filed the report */,
  "suspect_count" INTEGER /* Number of suspects involved */,
  "victim_count" INTEGER /* Number of victims involved */,
  "witness_count" INTEGER /* Number of witnesses involved */,
  "priority_level" INTEGER /* Priority level of the case */,
  "investigation_lead" TEXT /* Name of the lead investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_reports_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES police_districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_reports_crime_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., police officer, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., Active, Inactive, Suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed (either crime statistic or crime report) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES crime_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES crime_statistics ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data the file belongs to (either crime statistic or crime report) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., CSV, PDF, Image) */,
  "file_hash" TEXT /* Hash value of the file for integrity checks */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the file has been accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES crime_statistics ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES crime_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being versioned (either crime statistic or crime report) */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of changes in this version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  "version_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES crime_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES crime_statistics ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data modified (either crime statistic or crime report) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES crime_statistics ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES crime_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime location */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime report */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address where the crime occurred */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the crime occurred */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the crime occurred */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code where the crime occurred */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the crime location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the crime location */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood where the crime occurred */,
  "nearest_police_station" TEXT /* Nearest police station to the crime location */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of a photo of the crime scene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_locations_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES crime_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_suspects" (
  "suspect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suspect */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime report */,
  "suspect_name" TEXT /* Full name of the suspect */,
  "suspect_age" INTEGER /* Age of the suspect */,
  "suspect_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the suspect */,
  "suspect_race" TEXT /* Race of the suspect */,
  "suspect_address" TEXT /* Address of the suspect */,
  "arrest_date" TEXT /* Date the suspect was arrested */,
  "charges" TEXT /* Charges filed against the suspect */,
  "suspect_photo_url" TEXT /* URL of a photo of the suspect */,
  "previous_convictions" TEXT /* Previous convictions of the suspect */,
  "next_court_date" TEXT /* Next court appearance date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suspect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_suspects_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES crime_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_victims" (
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each victim */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime report */,
  "victim_name" TEXT /* Full name of the victim */,
  "victim_age" INTEGER /* Age of the victim */,
  "victim_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the victim */,
  "victim_race" TEXT /* Race of the victim */,
  "victim_address" TEXT /* Address of the victim */,
  "injury_level" TEXT /* Level of injury sustained (e.g., None, Minor, Major) */,
  "statement" TEXT /* Statement from the victim */,
  "victim_photo_url" TEXT /* URL of a photo of the victim */,
  "medical_records" TEXT /* URL of medical records */,
  "counselor_name" TEXT /* Name of the assigned counselor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("victim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_victims_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES crime_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_witnesses" (
  "witness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each witness */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime report */,
  "witness_name" TEXT /* Full name of the witness */,
  "witness_age" INTEGER /* Age of the witness */,
  "witness_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the witness */,
  "witness_race" TEXT /* Race of the witness */,
  "witness_address" TEXT /* Address of the witness */,
  "statement" TEXT /* Statement from the witness */,
  "witness_photo_url" TEXT /* URL of a photo of the witness */,
  "witness_relationship" TEXT /* Relationship to the victim or suspect */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the witness (e.g., 1 for low, 5 for high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("witness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_witnesses_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES crime_reports ("report_id")
)
